name: Steady Hands
description: Better precision for fishing, medicine, and fine tasks.

name: Field Notebook
description: More efficient observation and tracking progress.

name: Weird Luck
description: Odd good fortune in unlikely situations.

name: Boat Brain
description: Knows their way around maintenance, fuel, and river travel.

name: Gills
description: Improved underwater breathing and aquatic adaptation.

name: Schooling
description: Works well in groups and gains cooperative bonuses.

name: Jump
description: Improved mobility and evasive movement.

name: Wet Skin
description: Performs better in damp environments.

name: Shell
description: Protective body armor.

name: Swim
description: Strong movement in water.

name: Keen Nose
description: Better at tracking, scouting, and detecting danger.

name: Camouflage
description: Better stealth and concealment.

name: Flight
description: Can fly or glide.

name: Luminous
description: Glows in darkness.

name: Claws
description: Improved slashing or grappling attacks.

name: Fins
description: Improves swimming and deep-water movement.

name: Wings
description: Allows flying or gliding access to elevated terrain.

name: Climbing
description: Improves access to cliffs, trees, and rough terrain.

name: Burrowing
description: Can dig through soft soil, mud, and hidden passages.

name: Night Vision
description: Improves scouting and activity in dark areas.

name: Spore Resistant
description: Better resistance to fungal exposure.

name: Strong Jaw
description: Improves bite attacks and carrying small items.

name: Adhesive Feet
description: Improves climbing and wet-surface movement.
